headline: Zebra Technologies Celebrates 10 Year Anniversary of PartnerConnect Program
summary: LINCOLNSHIRE, Ill., April 27, 2026--Zebra Technologies Corporation (NASDAQ: ZBRA), a global leader in digitizing and automating workflows to deliver intelligent operations, today is celebrating the 10th anniversary of its Zebra™ PartnerConnect program. Zebra launched the program in 2016, unifying its global channel partners under a single, comprehensive program designed to foster growth, profitability, and success for the entire ecosystem.
